title: Tiruvalithayam
tagline: Tiruvalithayam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruvalithayam Tiruvallesvarar Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu deity Shiva, located at Padi, a north-western neighbourhood of Chennai, India.
overview.description: Tiruvalithayam Tiruvallesvarar Temple is a temple dedicated to the Hindu deity Shiva, located at Padi, a north-western neighbourhood of Chennai, India. Shiva is worshiped as Tiruvalleswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Jagathambikai. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th-century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil poet saints known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. The temple is associated with sage Bharadwaja, who worshipped the presiding deity in the form of a sparrow, giving the name Thiruvalithayam

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Bhaktavatsalam Vidyashram
topPlaces.description: Bhaktavatsalam Vidyashram is a school in Chennai, Korattur, India. It was founded in 1989 and mainly follows the CBSE standard of education, though a separate Tamil Nadu state board certifies high schools.

topPlaces.name: Korattur
topPlaces.description: Korattur is a neighbourhood situated in the western part of Chennai. It is a part of the Ambattur Zone of Chennai Corporation and located along the Chennai-Bangalore/Mumbai railroad about 12 km from the Chennai Central.

topPlaces.name: Padi, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Padi (Tamil: [paːɖi]) is a locality and neighbourhood in the city of Chennai, India. It was formerly named Thiruvaaipadi and was later shortened to Padi.

topPlaces.name: Mangal Lake (Chennai)
topPlaces.description: Mangal Aeri, or Mangal Lake, is a rain-fed reservoir in the neighbourhood of Mugappair in Chennai, India.

topPlaces.name: Madras Medical Mission
topPlaces.description: The Madras Medical Mission is a hospital located in Chennai. The first unit of the hospital was set up in 1987.

topPlaces.name: Villivakkam Lake
topPlaces.description: Villivakkam Lake (Villivakkam Aeri) is a lake spread over 36.34 acres in Villivakkam, Chennai, India. The lake is located to the south of the neighbourhood of Villivakkam, adjacent to the thickly populated Sidco Nagar, and drains into the Otteri Nullah.

topPlaces.name: Anna Nagar West
topPlaces.description: Anna Nagar West is a township in Chennai, India. It is the western part of Anna Nagar and is one of the most socially active locations in Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Mogappair
topPlaces.description: Mogappair (also known as Dr. J. J. Nagar) is a residential neighborhood in north-western Chennai, India.

items.note: Bhaktavatsalam Vidyashram is a school in Chennai, Korattur, India. It was founded in 1989 and mainly follows the CBSE standard of education, though a separate Tamil Nadu state board certifies high schools.

Korattur is a neighbourhood situated in the western part of Chennai. It is a part of the Ambattur Zone of Chennai Corporation and located along the Chennai-Bangalore/Mumbai railroad about 12 km from the Chennai Central.
Padi (Tamil: [paːɖi]) is a locality and neighbourhood in the city of Chennai, India. It was formerly named Thiruvaaipadi and was later shortened to Padi.
Mangal Aeri, or Mangal Lake, is a rain-fed reservoir in the neighbourhood of Mugappair in Chennai, India.
The Madras Medical Mission is a hospital located in Chennai. The first unit of the hospital was set up in 1987.

Villivakkam Lake (Villivakkam Aeri) is a lake spread over 36.34 acres in Villivakkam, Chennai, India. The lake is located to the south of the neighbourhood of Villivakkam, adjacent to the thickly populated Sidco Nagar, and drains into the Otteri Nullah.
Anna Nagar West is a township in Chennai, India. It is the western part of Anna Nagar and is one of the most socially active locations in Chennai.
Mogappair (also known as Dr. J. J. Nagar) is a residential neighborhood in north-western Chennai, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tiruvalithayam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tiruvalithayam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (12 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (10 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tiruvalithayam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tiruvalithayam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tiruvalithayam?
faq.a: Stays in Tiruvalithayam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tiruvalithayam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhaktavatsalam Vidyashram, Korattur, Padi, Chennai, Mangal Lake (Chennai), Madras Medical Mission.
